_description: Maps Wikidata properties to Wikifunctions sentence generators. Only properties that can produce meaningful article sentences are included.
_usage: Given a Wikidata item with property P31, use function Z26039 with the item as entity and the P31 value as class.

_dedup_rules.location_priority: P131 > P17 > P30. Only the most specific location property is used. P27 and P495 are not location relationships and use different functions.
_dedup_rules.capital_inverse: P36 and P1376 are inverses. Only one should appear per item. P1376 is skipped if P36 exists.
_dedup_rules.instance_vs_occupation: P31 is skipped when P106 is present, since occupation is more informative than 'is a human'.

P31.label: instance of
P31.notes: Most universal property. Maps entity to its class. Skipped when P106 exists or when a location property covers it.

P131.label: located in the administrative territorial entity
P131.function_name: State location using entity and class
P131.example: Kashima Shrine is a Shinto shrine in Kashima.
P131.notes: Requires P31 value as the class argument. Most specific location property.

P17.label: country
P17.function_name: State location using entity and class
P17.example: Tokyo Tower is a tower in Japan.
P17.notes: Same function as P131 but with country as location. Skipped when P131 exists.

P30.label: continent
P30.function_name: State location using entity and class
P30.example: Japan is a country in Asia.
P30.notes: Least specific location. Only used when P131 and P17 are absent.

P36.label: capital
P36.example: Tokyo is the capital of Japan.
P36.notes: Subject is the country, value is the capital city. Role=Q5119 (capital).

P6.label: head of government
P6.example: Fumio Kishida is the head of government of Japan.
P6.notes: Value is the person, role=Q2285706 (head of government).

P35.label: head of state
P35.example: Naruhito is the head of state of Japan.
P35.notes: Value is the person, role=Q48352 (head of state).

P825.label: dedicated to
P825.example: Meiji Shrine is dedicated to Emperor Meiji.
P825.notes: Role=Q1762010 (dedication). $value (deity) is the subject, SUBJECT (shrine) is the dependency. Migrated from Z26955 (K3,K1,K2).

P13723.label: shrine ranking
P13723.example: The shrine rank of Ise Grand Shrine is Jingu.
P13723.notes: Role=Q10444029 (shrine rank). $value (rank) is the subject, SUBJECT (shrine) is the dependency. Migrated from Z26955 (K3,K1,K2).

P138.label: named after
P138.notes: Skipped. The 'named after' relationship rarely produces useful article sentences and the predicate QID is unreliable.

P361.label: part of
P361.notes: Role=Q66305721 (part of). $value (whole) is K1, SUBJECT (part) is K3. Migrated from Z26955 (K3,K1,K2).

P527.label: has part(s)
P527.notes: Inverse of P361. Role=Q66305721 (part of). SUBJECT (whole) is K1, $value (part) is K3. Migrated from Z26955 (K3,K1,K2).

P2670.label: has part(s) of the class
P2670.example: An arm is part of a human body.
P2670.notes: Role=Q66305721 (part of). SUBJECT (whole) is K1, $value (class of parts) is K3. Migrated from Z26955 (K3,K1,K2).

P106.label: occupation
P106.notes: Treats occupation as an instance-of relationship. When present, P31 is skipped.

P27.label: country of citizenship
P27.example: Marie Curie is a citizen of Poland.
P27.notes: Role=Q42138 (citizenship). $value (country) is K1, SUBJECT (person) is K3. Migrated from Z26955 (K3,K1,K2).

P495.label: country of origin
P495.notes: Role=Q3373417 (country of origin). $value (country) is K1, SUBJECT is K3. Migrated from Z26955 (K3,K1,K2).

P1376.label: capital of
P1376.example: Tokyo is the capital of Japan.
P1376.notes: Subject is the capital, value is the country. Role=Q5119 (capital). Skipped when P36 exists.

P37.label: official language
P37.example: Japanese is the official language of Japan.
P37.notes: Value is the language, role=Q23492 (official language), dependency is the country/region.

P38.label: currency
P38.example: The yen is the currency of Japan.
P38.notes: Value is the currency, role=Q8142 (currency), dependency is the country/region.
